strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, and React matching primary stack
Hands-on AI agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators at current role
Strong engineering practices background: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and testing framework authorship
concerns: Resume lists JavaScript/TypeScript and Java but no explicit Kotlin or Nest.js experience
Limited evidence of cloud platform breadth (AWS mentioned briefly; no GCP/Azure or Kubernetes depth shown)
Heavy DLang focus in several roles may indicate less recent depth in the primary Node/React enterprise stack
response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with well over the required 6 years, current hands-on work in TypeScript/Node.js and AI agent tooling (MCP), and a strong craftsmanship background in testing and CI/CD. The primary gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js and Kotlin experience and limited visibility into cloud/Kubernetes depth, though the broad polyglot history suggests quick ramp-up is plausible.
